Title: Verify Question and Answer Flow
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Apertura pagina Pathfinder"
2. User is presented with a question
3. User selects a response
4. If a suggestion is available, it is displayed
5. If a suggestion is not available, the user is returned to the homepage
Expected Result: Question and answer flow is correctly handled

Title: Verify Suggestion Functionality
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Apertura pagina Pathfinder"
2. User is presented with a question
3. If a suggestion is available, it is displayed
4. User clicks on the suggestion
Expected Result: User is redirected to the suggested location

Title: Verify No Suggestion Functionality
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Apertura pagina Pathfinder"
2. User is presented with a question
3. If no suggestion is available, the user is returned to the homepage
Expected Result: User is returned to the homepage
